title: Better Survival Resource Pack
description: For a Modpack I have now released (Better Survival).
body:
Turns panorama into a jungle with a modded structure. For a modpack that I have not finished yet. Also changes splash texts and the end poem lol.
Structure from Dungeons and Taverns Jungle Temple Replacement (https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns-jungle-temple-replacement). It's a cool mod/datapack check it out.
Feel free to use in a modpack if you want to for some reason.
